purpose: Continuously mine four model avenues for speculative but falsifiable A733 SDMMC0 IDMAC work without letting duplicate or hallucinated ideas become kernel patches.

accepted_for_test.result: H036 set the ER bit and still stalled at DESC_READ with descriptor memory unchanged.

accepted_for_audit: Continue public U-Boot/TF-A/SCP/firmware handoff source audit for one named clock/reset/fabric/security delta.
Keep checking public archive/Gmail for maintainer feedback on A733 IDMAC descriptor-fetch reachability.
rejected_or_duplicate: Descriptor alignment, size, address shift, below-4G placement, coherent-vs-streaming allocation, and 64-bit DMA mask were already closed.
Broad MBUS/NSI/IOMMU/fabric bit spraying is already closed or too risky without source evidence.
PIO-only support remains a lab diagnostic/runtime proof, not an upstreamable substitute for correct SDMMC0 IDMAC support.

decision: Run model squeeze batches repeatedly, but only promote ideas into the hypothesis queue when they include a concrete source path, register, one-variable test, and falsifier not already covered by H009-H036.
